text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. We're thrilled to have you helping keep things running smoothly. Please check out the moderator guidelines and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions!

Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Event Helper role. We're excited to have you helping organize and run community events. Feel free to introduce yourself and reach out to the team!

Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've joined as a Member. We're glad to have you here — feel free to explore, introduce yourself, and jump into the conversation. Let us know if you need any help getting started!

Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Mentor role. We're so glad to have your expertise and guidance here. Please check out the mentor resources and feel free to connect with the team!
